testcase.name: resume_nonPausedJob_returnsRejected

testcase.name: cancel_unknownJob_returnsJobNotFound

[1] dead letters encountered. If this is not an expected behavior then Actor[pekko://JobManagerTest/user/$c/replay-job-c2/pool-c2/pworker-77851c00#-338388495] may have terminated unexpectedly. This logging can be turned off or adjusted with configuration settings 'pekko.log-dead-letters' and 'pekko.log-dead-letters-during-shutdown'.
